requirement_text: RTI shall maintain object instance identity using globally unique object instance handles and unique names within a federation execution.
notes: Current coarse Clause 6 identity row covers unique instance-handle and unique-name behavior at the federation level.

requirement_text: RTI shall make object instances known to joined federates through discovery before delivering normal attribute reflections for those instances.
notes: Discovery-before-normal-delivery behavior is directly aligned with the discovery-known-class tranche.

requirement_text: RTI shall preserve the object class by which an object instance is known to a federate after discovery.
notes: Known-class stability after discovery is directly covered by the focused discovery regression.

requirement_text: RTI shall route attribute updates only when publication, ownership, subscription, scope, transportation, order, time, and DDM conditions are satisfied.
notes: The repo proves publication/subscription/scope routing plus supported transport and ordering slices, but this packet row is broader than any single current requirement.

requirement_text: RTI shall route interactions only when publication, subscription, transportation, order, time, and DDM conditions are satisfied.
notes: Interaction routing is proven for joined subscribed federates, but the packet row also rolls in transportation, ordering, time, and DDM breadth not yet harmonized into one repo-native row.

requirement_text: RTI shall reject or fail invalid object management operations without corrupting object instance state.
notes: Negative-path handling exists across update, interaction, and deletion flows, but the packet semantic row is intentionally broader than the current curated requirements.

requirement_text: RTI shall support both RTI-generated and federate-supplied object instance names according to reservation and registration semantics.
notes: The current registration-and-naming tranche directly covers RTI-assigned and federate-supplied instance names.

requirement_text: RTI shall distinguish federation-wide deletion from local deletion of a known object instance.
notes: Federation-wide delete and local delete semantics are each proven, but they still live in separate coarse rows rather than one explicit semantic bridge row.

requirement_text: RTI shall maintain attribute scope state and notify subscribed federates when attributes enter or leave scope.
notes: The current scope-callback regression proves both entering-scope and leaving-scope transitions through the paired 6.17/6.18 callbacks.

requirement_text: RTI shall preserve user-supplied tags through update, interaction, and deletion delivery where the corresponding service carries a tag.
notes: Basic delivery flows exercise tagged update and interaction paths, but there is no explicit harmonized tag-preservation requirement or observer audit yet.

requirement_text: RTI shall apply receive-order and timestamp-order delivery rules from Time Management to object updates, interactions, and deletes.
notes: Timestamp-order attribute delivery is proven, but interaction-order and delete-order harmonization remain broader than the current coarse ledger.

requirement_text: RTI shall provide the Reserve Object Instance Name service.
notes: The coarse Clause 6 ledger already carries a direct service or callback requirement for this operation.

notes: Static signature audit now proves the public RTIambassador or FederateAmbassador binding exists and the source-derived Java API metadata records the expected Clause 6 overload shapes.
